questions.question: MATCHING ITEMS
questions.memo: 2.1 P - ADSL, 2.2 H - Router, 2.3 C - Section Break, 2.4 D - Drone, 2.5 F - CAPTCHA, 2.6 M - OR, 2.7 Q - Service pack, 2.8 B - Information overload, 2.9 R - Keylogging, 2.10 K - Accuracy

questions.question: TRUE/FALSE ITEMS
questions.memo: 3.1 False, Form, 3.2 True, 3.3 False, Spam, 3.4 True, 3.5 False, Knowledge

questions.question: SYSTEMS TECHNOLOGIES
questions.memo: 4.1.1 Size of the memory used by the CPU - 64 GB, 4.1.2 Utility software - AVG/Antivirus, 4.1.3 Reason for using Bluetooth instead of Wi-Fi - Automatic installation makes connection quicker, 4.1.4 TWO advantages for having an SSD of 2 TB and an HDD of 4 TB - Increased storage capacity, Separate working files and applications, 4.1.5 TWO compatibility issues - Features might not work properly in older versions, The files might not open in the older versions

questions.question: INTERNET AND NETWORK TECHNOLOGIES
questions.memo: 5.1 TWO devices shared in a network besides computers - Printer/multifunction device, Router/wireless router/Internet access points, 5.2 TWO differences between intranet and internet - Private network, Public network, 5.3 TWO ways fibre-optic improve data transmission speed - Light based transmission allows data to travel faster, Higher bandwidth capacity carries more data simultaneously, 5.4 TWO government internet services - Information about education/health/justice etc., License renewal, 5.5 ONE reason for using a Bookmark feature - Quick access to saved websites, 5.6.1 Why use Bcc instead of Cc fields in e-mail - So that other users cannot see who e-mails are sent to, 5.6.2 Reason for using the forward instead of reply to - The person is not on the original receiver’s list, 5.6.3 TWO reasons for using web-based email systems - Accessible from anywhere, Integrates with other cloud services and productivity tools, 5.7 TWO differences between vodcast and real-time streaming - Pre-recorded episodes, Live broadcasting

questions.question: INFORMATION MANAGEMENT
questions.memo: 6.1 Focus question - A question that provides guidance and clarity for the research, 6.2 ONE other source to collect data excluding printed media - Interviews, 6.3 Definition of plagiarism - Plagiarism refers to the act of using someone else's work, ideas, or information without giving proper credit, 6.4 TWO ways for using database to analyse and process data - Queries/Reports, Totals (Functions/Formulas), 6.5.1 TWO ways to avoid being biased when asking questions - Avoid questions that are leading to a particular answer, Phrase question neutrally/Use clear language, 6.5.2 TWO ways to use question: 'How many' for analysis - Provide numerical data for the use of calculations, Numerical data are used to create graphs

questions.question: SOCIAL IMPLICATIONS
questions.memo: 7.1 ONE way to dispose of computing devices - E-waste recycling centre, 7.2 TWO negative effects ICT has on humans - Physical health: Increase obesity, Mental and emotional health: Overuse can lead to technology addiction, 7.3 Prevention of repetitive strain injuries - Use an ergonomic/comfort keyboard, 7.4 Employee benefits for using telecommuting - Employee can work more flexible hours/flexibility, Saves on the cost of transport and clothing suitable for work environments, 7.5 TWO reasons why updating software will benefit the user - New functions/features could be added, Existing security breaches may be fixed, 7.6 ONE advantage and ONE disadvantage for the use of cryptocurrency - Advantages: Payments can be made anywhere in the world, Disadvantages: Make anonymous payment/Cannot trace who made the payment

questions.question: SOLUTION DEVELOPMENT
questions.memo:
8.1 Report feature to display per category - Grouping, 8.2 Why use a lookup wizard in database table - To create a list of options so that the user can choose, 8.3 Word processing features for navigation in same document - Find, Go To/Bookmark, 8.4 TWO reasons for the use of linked objects in a Word processing document - Give quick access to the document to edit, Automatically updates with the new changes made in the document, 8.5 Reason for error message - The error occurs when you enter a function/formula that contains a cell reference that is the same as the cell in which the function/formula is entered, 8.6 Explain use of True and False in the Range_lookup - True finds the closest match to the lookup value, False finds the exact match of the lookup value, 8.7.1 TWO missing tags - Bold tags: operating hours:, Horizontal line:
, 8.7.2 THREE reasons for image not displaying - Image is not saved in the same location as the file, The file extension is incorrect, Name for the image is incorrect, 8.7.3 Attribute to include to display 'The Zoo' if picture does not display - attribute

questions.question: INTEGRATED SCENARIO
questions.memo: 9.1.1 Identify and explain ONE way candidates can use ICTs to promote campaign - Social media, 9.1.2 TWO ways to avoid falling victim to social engineering - Do not share personal information, Do not accept requests from unknown people, 9.1.3 Concept of digital footprint - The trail of data left by a candidate campaigning's online activities, 9.2.1 TWO advantages of using electronic voting system - Improved accessibility and convenience for voters, Faster tallying and reporting of results, 9.2.2 Accessibility of electronic voting for physical disabilities - Provide an assistant for voters with a physical disability, Provide specific assistive devices, 9.2.3 ONE hardware issue and ONE solution - Experts needed to set up/Training, Ensure the school has a reliable internet connection/Have a backup option, 9.3 TWO ways to secure the network - Use of encryption/Strong password, Access controls, 9.4 TWO ICT-related jobs - Data analyst, Web developer, 9.5.1 Property set on Learner Code field - Primary Key, 9.5.2 Control used for Name and Surname field - List box/Combo Box, 9.5.3 Validation rule for Position field - 'C' Or 'S' Or 'T', 9.6.1 Spreadsheets feature to get total per candidate - SUBTOTAL, 9.6.2 ONE reason to use a chart for feedback - Clearer/Easier to understand the results, 9.7 TWO factors to consider for layout of web page design - The page should be easy to navigate with clear headings, The text should be readable on different devices

questions.question: INTEGRATED SCENARIO
questions.memo: 10.1.1 TWO other input devices instead of barcode scanner - Keyboard, Mouse, 10.1.2 TWO troubleshooting methods to determine why barcode scanner is not scanning - Check if the barcode scanner is connected/plugged in/Bluetooth is on, Check if the cord is damaged, 10.2.1 Term capped - Capped refers to the limit of data available to the user during a specific period, 10.2.2 TWO ways for solving limited storage space - Remove unwanted programs/files, Remove duplicate files, 10.3 TWO problems customers experience while using hotspot - Signal loss/interference, Lack of security/Unauthorised users, 10.4.1 TWO reasons Sanele should make automatic backups - No user intervention required for backups, Employees may forget if done manually, 10.4.2 TWO guidelines to consider when making backups - Keep backups off-site, Use more than one storage medium, 10.5 TWO advantages of using video conferencing - Not restricted to a specific location, No need to travel, 10.6.1 Feature used in cell A1 - Merge and centre, 10.6.2 Reason why formula is incorrect with solution - The formula in F17 does not include all the relevant cells, Solution: =SUM(F14:F16), 10.6.3 Function to determine preparation date - =DATE(YEAR(B10),MONTH(B10),DAY(B10)+7), 10.7.1 Printer automatically working - Plug-and-Play, 10.7.2 Ways to save ink - Print in draft mode or economical mode, Adjust print resolution, 10.8 TWO possible layout errors - Not enough space for the name, Not enough blocks for the contact number
